name: MedlinePlus
description: Trusted health information from the National Library of Medicine covering diseases, conditions, and wellness topics.
sample_snippets: MedlinePlus provides authoritative health information written for patients and their families.
Information on thousands of diseases, conditions, and wellness topics from the National Institutes of Health.

name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
description: US public health agency providing guidance on disease prevention, health promotion, and emergency preparedness.
sample_snippets: The CDC provides evidence-based public health guidance and disease surveillance data.
CDC recommendations on vaccines, disease prevention, and outbreak response.

name: World Health Organization (WHO)
description: International public health authority providing global health guidance and disease statistics.
sample_snippets: WHO provides global health leadership, norms and standards, and technical support to countries.
International health statistics and evidence-based public health guidelines.

name: National Institutes of Health (NIH)
description: Primary US federal agency for biomedical and public health research.
sample_snippets: NIH funds and conducts research to improve health and prevent disease.
Access to peer-reviewed research and clinical trial information from the world's largest medical research agency.

name: National Health Service (NHS)
description: UK national health service providing patient health information and clinical guidance.
sample_snippets: NHS provides trusted health information for patients on symptoms, treatments, and self-care.
Evidence-based clinical information reviewed by UK healthcare professionals.

name: Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA)
description: US agency leading efforts to reduce substance use and mental health disorders.
sample_snippets: SAMHSA provides resources for mental health and substance use disorder prevention and treatment.
National Helpline: 1-800-662-4357 — free, confidential, 24/7 treatment referral service.
